title: Someone You Loved
album: Divinely Uninspired To A Hellish Extent
why_this_song: Someone You Loved by Lewis Capaldi (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I need somebody to heal, somebody to know"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I guess I kinda liked the way you numbed all the pain"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I let my guard down, and then you pulled the rug"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I let my guard down, and then you pulled the rug"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somebody" in the whole song?

Now the day bleeds into nightfall

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Someone You Loved" was released in 2018. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Someone You Loved" foi lançada em 2018. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Someone You Loved" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Someone You Loved" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
